name: huum_sauna
description: Read/control a Huum electric sauna (Drop + UKU Wi-Fi) via Huum cloud API: status, on/off, temperature, humidity, light.
help_example:
sauna — current status
sauna on [T] — turn on (default 80, range 40-110)
sauna off — turn off
sauna temp <T> — change target temperature
sauna humidity <0-10> — set steamer humidity
sauna light — toggle light
sauna raw — raw JSON

Safety: starting is blocked while door is open. Add 'force' to override: sauna on 85 force

Recipes:
• Quick warm-up: sauna on 85
• Steam session: sauna on 75 → sauna humidity 6
• Done: sauna off
